Choose a bookmark to attach this orphane: Choose a bookmark to attach this orphaned image to. This will set (or replace) that bookmark's image.

Choose an icon and a color for each plac: Choose an icon and a color for each place type. The icon is drawn inside the pin on the Locations map; the color overrides the level-group color for that place type.
Choose an image to upload, or fetch one: Choose an image to upload, or fetch one from the source. Stored as a WebP.
Choose how each connector link appears i: Choose how each connector link appears in the left sidebar's Connectors section.
Choose how this section's bookmarks are: Choose how this section's bookmarks are ordered. Uses the same sort options as the Listings page.
Choose where each Add Bookmark form fiel: Choose where each Add Bookmark form field appears — in the main area (Default), tucked into the collapsible Advanced section, or hidden. The URL field is always shown. Placement only affects the Add Bookmark form; every field stays editable after a bookmark is created.
Choose which bookmarks appear in this se: Choose which bookmarks appear in this section. Combine conditions with AND/OR.
Choose which categories offer this tag w: Choose which categories offer this tag when tagging a bookmark. Checking a category that currently allows every tag will limit it to an explicit list. Use “All categories” to offer this tag in every category at once.
Choose which categories this property ap: Choose which categories this property applies to.
Choose which fields the quick Add Bookma: Choose which fields the quick Add Bookmark form shows, and where.
Choose which filters show by default in: Choose which filters show by default in the filter sidebar. Filters set to “On demand” are hidden until you add them from the “Add filter” control.
Choose which level groups appear on the: Choose which level groups appear on the map and how each renders.
Choose which root tags are available whe: Choose which root tags are available when tagging bookmarks in this category. Leave all unchecked to hide the tag picker entirely for this category.
Conditions that decide whether this rule: Conditions that decide whether this rule applies.

Control the size of images and video emb: Control the size of images and video embeds on the bookmark detail page.

When enabled, leaving the URL field whil: When enabled, leaving the URL field while adding a bookmark fetches the page’s title automatically. You can always fetch it manually with the button next to the Name field.
When enabled, saving a bookmark whose ti: When enabled, saving a bookmark whose title contains an existing location’s name automatically applies that location. Matching is case-insensitive and only counts whole words.

When enabled, saving a bookmark whose title contains an existing tag’s name automatically applies that tag. Matching is case-insensitive and only counts whole words, so a tag named “art” won’t match “Martin”.
When enabled, the Images section of the: When enabled, the Images section of the Add Bookmark form is collapsed by default — the page’s preview image will be fetched automatically when you save. Disable to always show the Images section expanded.
When on, the drawer docks as a persisten: When on, the drawer docks as a persistent column on the right side. The pin button inside the drawer lets you toggle this on the fly.
